<?php namespace Laravel\Sanctum\Exceptions; use Illuminate\Auth\Access\AuthorizationException; use Illuminate\Support\Arr; /** * @deprecated * @see \Laravel\Sanctum\Exceptions\MissingAbilityException */ class MissingScopeException extends AuthorizationException { /** * Create a new missing scope exception. * * @param array|string $scopes The scopes that the user did not have. * @param string $message */ public function __construct(protected $scopes = [], $message = 'Invalid scope(s) provided.') { parent::__construct($message); $this->scopes = Arr::wrap($scopes); } /** * Get the scopes that the user did not have. * * @return array */ public function scopes() { return $this->scopes; } }
